message:
feat(core): support GROUP BY with JOIN via pre-materialized join rows (bd-29mz)

When a SELECT has both GROUP BY and JOINs, materialize the join first
(via execute_join_select), build a col_map with original table labels,
then apply GROUP BY grouping/aggregation directly on the joined rows.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
